texto: What is this so-called 'employment flexibility'? It simply means that employers, in their quest to reduce costs whilst trying to meet the demands of globalisation, are disregarding the traditional job boundaries – often to the detriment of the unskilled, non-standard worker. Employers use non-standard workers to avoid restrictive labour laws and collective bargaining restraints. In addition, the practice provides them with more flexibility.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de E.S. Fourie que provoca temas ligados a trabalho. Ao questionar “What is this so-called 'employment flexibility'? It simply means that employers, in their quest t…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre trabalho, atypical-workers, capitalism, com foco em dia-chuvoso e trabalho.
